title: Faster cold start — your data shows before the hub connects
summary: The app now warms the local cache and hub connection during boot and shows a clear 'restoring' state instead of a blank screen, so returning users see their workspace sooner.
highlights: Boot timeline instrumentation to attribute startup cost
Local-first 'restoring from hub' state replaces blank/empty screens after a browser cache eviction
Hub preconnect + faster first-dial retry shrink time-to-connected
